title: retama webbii
intro: Retama webbii, also known as the Webb's retama or tree broom, is a tree species native to the Canary Islands. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Retama webbii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Retama webbii is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
